error_signature: The request is missing a required parameter
title: UpWork OAuth2 token expiration issue
symptom: After 24 hours, the UpWork node fails with an error indicating a missing or invalid parameter, preventing the workflow from executing.
applies_when: Using UpWork node with OAuth2 Authorization Code grant
not_this_if: Tokens are refreshed before each request
Error does not occur after the first 24 hours
root_cause: The UpWork OAuth2 access tokens expire after 24 hours, leading to requests failing due to missing or invalid authentication parameters. Without a refresh mechanism, subsequent requests will not be authorized.
fix_steps: Store the OAuth2 auth and refresh tokens in a database
Implement a mechanism to refresh the auth token before each request or set up a daily cron job to refresh the token
agent_instruction: Store and refresh the UpWork OAuth2 tokens to ensure valid authentication for requests.
